description: Perform a technical SEO audit to identify code bloat on https://books.toscrape.com/ using Screaming Frog SEO Spider. Export the internal HTML data including text-to-code ratios to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/code_bloat_data.csv. Create a text report at ~/Documents/SEO/reports/bloat_analysis.txt listing the top 5 pages with the lowest text-to-code ratios and the approximate average ratio for the site.
